title: Aurora, 82059, Palm Pals Spots Ladybird 5In, Soft Toy, Red & Black
features: Introducing Palm Pals Spots Ladybird, the latest addition to Aurora's most popular Palm Pals Collection. Spots Ladybird, faster than any little bug, flies through the air in search of her new flying partner. Spots Ladybird is a red and black coloured ladybird soft toy. It is filled with beans that fit perfectly in your hand.

Palm Pals are soft and extremely touchable toys made with high-quality materials. Spots Ladybird is part of our Eco-Friendly initiative and comes with inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic materials. Our hangtags are recyclable with our cloth labels being made from recycled materials.

This adorable ladybird-soft toy comes under the Palm Pals Critters collection. Palm Pals, our best-selling product range, offers a variety of collections like Craving, Pets, Zoo, Whimsical, Aquatic and many more. They all are super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Suitable from Birth. Palm Pals Spots Ladybird measures 13cm. This soft toy is a great gift for any occasion, whether for a birthday or as a general gift, Everyone will fall in love with this adorable red and black coloured ladybird which has a cute smiling face with a pair of antennae and wings at the back. This is a hugely collectable range.

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful soft toy and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.
